final:
// // This module resets the output on the rising edge of the reset signal and updates the output on the falling edge of the clock.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset_n,
  input [3:0] switches,
  output reg [3:0] data_out
);always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    if (~reset_n) begin
      data_out <= 0;
    end else begin
      data_out <= switches;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module resets the output on the rising edge of the reset signal and updates the output on the falling edge of the clock.
